phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Monet cathedral paintings are displayed
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la salle consacrée aux tableaux de Monet représentant la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah SAL kohn-sah-KRAY oh tah-BLOH duh moh-NAY ruh-pray-zahn-TAHN lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: The museum owns several of Monet's Cathedral series paintings. They are among the highlights of the permanent collection and demonstrate his revolutionary exploration of light and atmosphere.

responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH SAHL day zam-pray-syoh-NEEST
responses.local: Au premier étage, salle des Impressionnistes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether there is a current temporary exhibition
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une exposition temporaire en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon ex-poh-zee-SYOHN tahm-poh-RAIR ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée des Beaux-Arts de Rouen is one of France's largest regional art museums, with a collection spanning the 15th to 20th centuries. Its temporary exhibitions are often of national importance.

responses.english: Yes, it is posted at reception.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a student discount
phrases.text_local: Il y a un tarif étudiant ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah uhn tah-REEF ay-too-DYAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Most French museums offer reduced rates for students under 26.

phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me donner un plan du musée, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: poor-YAY-voo muh doh-NAY uhn PLAHN doo moo-ZAY seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is large and spread across multiple floors. A free floor plan is available at the entrance in several languages. The highlights room (les chefs-d'œuvre) is a good starting point.

responses.english: Yes, pick one up at reception.
responses.phonetic: wee pruh-NAY zahn uhn ah lah-KUY

phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a une librairie-boutique dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah oon lee-brai-REE-boo-TEEK dahn luh moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum shop stocks quality art books, prints of the Monet cathedral series, and postcards. It is open during museum hours and accessible without a museum ticket.

responses.english: On the ground floor, near the exit.
responses.phonetic: oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY pray duh lah sor-TEE
responses.local: Au rez-de-chaussée, près de la sortie.
